title: kobresia pygmaea
intro: Kobresia pygmaea is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the high-altitude wetlands of the Himalayas and is also known as the "Pygmy Kobresia" or "Tibetan Kobresia". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Kobresia pygmaea include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, and it is often prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption.
